calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Mar-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Civil Harassment OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Diana Chen, CSR #11312 Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Jacob Harker, Esq. for Petitioner: Lillie Hart, who was not present.

No appearance by the Respondent: Terry LaVonne.

Mr. Harker stated that his client was taking a different route, that she was pursuing mediation regarding this matter, and that they wanted to withdraw the petition. The Court inquired whether Counsel was asking for it to take the matter off calendar or dismiss it without prejudice. Mr. Harker requested that the Court dismiss the matter without prejudice.
The Court dismissed the matter without prejudice at the request of Counsel.
